all.en: The Pinnacle Institute is pleased to announce its annual Leadership Development Workshop, a three-day professional development program designed for mid-career managers and emerging executives.
all.zh: Pinnacle 研究所很高興宣布其年度領導力發展研習營，這是一個為期三天的專業發展課程，專為中階主管及新晉高階主管設計。

all.en: The workshop will be held from June 15 to June 17 at the Harborview Conference Center, located at 482 Wellington Avenue in downtown Bristol.
all.zh: 本研習營將於 6 月 15 日至 6 月 17 日在位於 Bristol 市中心 Wellington 大道 482 號的 Harborview 會議中心舉行。

all.en: Eligibility is limited to professionals who have completed at least five years of managerial experience, and a recommendation letter from a current supervisor is a prerequisite for application.
all.zh: 報名資格僅限於已具備至少五年管理經驗的專業人士，且現任主管的推薦信為申請的先決條件。

all.en: Day 1 will commence with a registration and welcome breakfast from 8:00 a.m. to 9:00 a.m. in the Atrium Lobby.
all.zh: 第一天將於上午 8 點至 9 點在中庭大廳開始進行報到並提供歡迎早餐。

all.en: The opening keynote, titled 「Reimagining Leadership in a Changing World」, will be delivered by Dr. Helena Marsh from 9:15 a.m. to 10:45 a.m.
all.zh: 開幕主題演講題為「在變動世界中重新想像領導力」，將由 Helena Marsh 博士於上午 9 點 15 分至 10 點 45 分發表。

all.en: Dr. Marsh is a tenured professor of organizational behavior at Cambridge Business School and the author of four best-selling books on adaptive management.
all.zh: Marsh 博士是劍橋商學院組織行為學的終身教授，並著有四本關於適應性管理的暢銷書。

all.en: Following the keynote, attendees will participate in an interactive session on emotional intelligence facilitated by certified coach Marcus Olamide.
all.zh: 主題演講結束後，與會者將參加由認證教練 Marcus Olamide 主持的情緒智商互動課程。

all.en: Day 2 will focus on strategic decision-making, beginning with a case study analysis of three multinational corporations that successfully navigated organizational restructuring.
all.zh: 第二天將著重於策略決策，首先進行一項案例研究分析，探討三家跨國企業如何成功應對組織重整。

all.en: From 1:30 p.m. to 3:00 p.m., participants will be divided into breakout groups to develop a hypothetical turnaround plan under the guidance of senior facilitators.
all.zh: 下午 1 點 30 分至 3 點，學員將分成小組討論，在資深引導員的指導下擬定假設性的企業轉型計畫。

all.en: A networking reception with complimentary hors d 「oeuvres and refreshments will follow the afternoon sessions in the Riverside Garden.
all.zh: 下午課程結束後，將於河畔花園舉辦交流酒會，並免費提供開胃小點與飲品。

all.en: The Day 3 morning program features a panel discussion on cross-cultural team management, moderated by acclaimed consultant Yuki Tanaka.
all.zh: 第三天上午的議程包含一場跨文化團隊管理的專題座談，由著名顧問 Yuki Tanaka 擔任主持人。

all.en: Ms. Tanaka has advised Fortune 500 companies across twelve countries and previously served as Chief Talent Officer at Meridian Global Holdings.
all.zh: Tanaka 女士曾為遍及十二個國家的財星 500 大企業提供顧問服務，並曾任 Meridian Global Holdings 的人才長。

all.en: The closing workshop, scheduled from 2:00 p.m. to 4:30 p.m., will guide participants through the creation of a personalized 90-day leadership action plan.
all.zh: 結業工作坊安排於下午 2 點至 4 點 30 分，將引導學員制定個人化的 90 天領導力行動計畫。

all.en: By the end of the program, participants are expected to demonstrate enhanced competency in conflict resolution, strategic communication, and team motivation.
all.zh: 課程結束時，學員預期能在衝突解決、策略溝通與團隊激勵方面展現提升的能力。

all.en: All attendees who complete the full three-day program will receive a certificate of completion accredited by the International Association of Management Educators.
all.zh: 完成整個三天課程的所有與會者將獲得由國際管理教育者協會認證的結業證書。

all.en: The registration fee is 1,250 pounds per participant, which includes all course materials, daily lunches, and the closing gala dinner on June 17.
all.zh: 報名費為每位學員 1,250 英鎊，內含所有課程資料、每日午餐及 6 月 17 日的結業晚宴。

all.en: Early-bird applicants who register before May 20 will be eligible for a 15 percent discount on the standard fee.
all.zh: 於 5 月 20 日前報名的早鳥申請者可享有標準費用 15% 的折扣優惠。

all.en: The final registration deadline is June 1, and seats are allocated on a first-come, first-served basis due to limited capacity.
all.zh: 最終報名截止日為 6 月 1 日，由於名額有限，座位將依先到先得原則分配。

all.en: Cancellations made at least ten business days prior to the event will receive a full refund, minus a nominal administrative charge of 50 pounds.
all.zh: 於活動開始至少十個工作天前取消者可獲全額退款，但需扣除 50 英鎊的行政手續費。

all.en: Complimentary shuttle service will be provided between three partner hotels and the conference venue each morning and evening.
all.zh: 每日早晚將於三家合作飯店與會場之間提供免費接駁車服務。

all.en: Participants requiring dietary accommodations or accessibility arrangements should notify the organizing committee no later than May 25.
all.zh: 需特殊飲食安排或無障礙設施的學員應於 5 月 25 日前通知籌辦委員會。

all.en: For further inquiries or to submit an application, please contact Program Coordinator Ms. Priya Ravenscroft at p.ravenscroft@pinnacleinstitute.org or by phone at 020-7946-0185.
all.zh: 如需進一步詢問或提交申請，請聯繫課程協調員 Priya Ravenscroft 女士，電子信箱為 p.ravenscroft@pinnacleinstitute.org，或致電 020-7946-0185。

all.en: Detailed session descriptions, speaker biographies, and the online application portal are available on the institute website at www.pinnacleinstitute.org/leadership2024.
all.zh: 詳細的課程說明、講者簡介及線上申請入口可於研究所網站 www.pinnacleinstitute.org/leadership2024 查詢。
